recommendations.title: Night Tide
recommendations.overview: A young sailor falls in love with a mysterious woman performing as a mermaid on the local pier. As they become entwined, he comes to suspect the woman might be a real mermaid who lures men to a watery death during the full moon.  Preserved by the Aca

recommendations.title: Anomalisa
recommendations.overview: An inspirational speaker becomes reinvigorated after meeting a lively woman who shakes up his mundane existence.

recommendations.title: Human Desire
recommendations.overview: A Korean War vet returns to his job as a railroad engineer and becomes involved in a sordid affair with a co-worker's wife and murder.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive, in partnership with Sony Pictures Entertainment, in 1997.

recommendations.title: The Yearling
recommendations.overview: Jody convinces his parents to allow him to adopt a young deer, but what will happen if the deer misbehaves?

recommendations.title: Wild River
recommendations.overview: A young bureaucrat for the Tennessee Valley Authority goes to rural Tennessee to oversee the building of a dam. He encounters opposition from the local people, in particular a farmer who objects to his employment (with pay) of local black laborers. M

recommendations.title: Harlan County U.S.A.
recommendations.overview: This film documents the coal miners' strike against the Brookside Mine of the Eastover Mining Company in Harlan County, Kentucky in June, 1973. Eastover's refusal to sign a contract (when the miners joined with the United Mine Workers of America) led

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Cobain: Montage of Heck
recommendations.overview: Hailed as one of the most innovative and intimate documentaries of all time, experience Kurt Cobain like never before in the only ever fully authorized portrait of the famed music icon. Academy Award nominated filmmaker Brett Morgen expertly blends C

recommendations.title: Coraline
recommendations.overview: Wandering her rambling old house in her boring new town, 11-year-old Coraline discovers a hidden door to a strangely idealized version of her life. In order to stay in the fantasy, she must make a frighteningly real sacrifice.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.
